message_body_markdown:
Gunluk Degerleme Radari | 2026-07-01 | Taslak

Kapsam: 1 kurum raporu, 42 gecerli satir, 0 manuel kontrol kaydi.

Bugun kontrol edilen kaynaklar
- OYAK Yatirim | Nerede: https://www.oyakyatirim.com.tr/arastirma-raporlari | Ne kontrol edilir: Latest valuation table PDF | Siklik: per release
- KAP | Nerede: https://kap.org.tr/en | Ne kontrol edilir: Material events, financial statements, corporate actions | Siklik: intraday
- Borsa Istanbul | Nerede: https://www.borsaistanbul.com/en/markets/equity-market | Ne kontrol edilir: Equity market, sector flow and daily bulletin | Siklik: intraday
- TCMB | Nerede: https://www.tcmb.gov.tr/wps/wcm/connect/EN/TCMB%2BEN/Main%2BMenu/Statistics | Ne kontrol edilir: Data release calendar, rates, exchange rates and markets data | Siklik: daily
- TUIK | Nerede: https://veriportali.tuik.gov.tr/en | Ne kontrol edilir: Inflation, industrial production and confidence releases | Siklik: calendar-driven

Piyasa baglami
- Consensus expectations | Neden onemli: Prices embed expectations, so the report should show whether the narrative is optimistic or pessimistic. | Kontrol yeri: Research tabs, broker revisions and market prices
- Macro rates and FX | Neden onemli: Valuation multiples and risk appetite are sensitive to policy rate and TRY moves. | Kontrol yeri: TCMB statistics and exchange-rate pages
- Sector rotation and liquidity | Neden onemli: Top names move differently from thin names; liquidity and float should affect ranking. | Kontrol yeri: Borsa Istanbul equity market and indices pages
- Corporate events | Neden onemli: KAP disclosures can invalidate a target-price assumption very quickly. | Kontrol yeri: KAP material event disclosures

One cikan izleme adaylari
- ALBRK | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 13.85 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-07-01
- ISMEN | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 71.4 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-07-01
- PGSUS | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 342.0 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-07-01
- HTTBT | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 68.64 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-07-01
- GLRMK | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 326.4 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-07-01

Anomali / ayrisma uyarilari
- ALBRK icin tek kurumdan gelen %70 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- ISMEN icin tek kurumdan gelen %98 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- PGSUS icin tek kurumdan gelen %94 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- HTTBT icin tek kurumdan gelen %77 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- GLRMK icin tek kurumdan gelen %93 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.

Revizyon momentumu
- Dikkat gerektiren yeni revizyon serisi yok.

Manuel kontrol gerektirenler
- Manuel kontrol kuyrugunda acik kritik kayit yok.

Bugun atilacak aksiyonlar
- Implement consensus engine output so the report can compare current price, average target and median target.
- Add broker count filter so single-broker names are visually separated from consensus names.
- Keep manual approval on until KAP, macro and consensus checks are wired into the pipeline.

Bu icerik yatirim tavsiyesi degildir. Otomatik veri analizi ve genel piyasa taramasidir. Nihai karar kullaniciya aittir.
approval_notes: primary=PENDING:Report is structurally coherent and includes a disclaimer, but all top candidates rely on a single broker source with high positive divergence flagged as requiring manual control. No manual reviews have been performed, and the report explicitly notes that manual approval should remain active until additional checks are integrated. This makes the output useful for internal review but not yet ready for public automation.

secondary=PENDING:Report is internally coherent and includes a disclaimer, but relies on a single broker source for all top candidates, lacks consensus engine output, and has no manual review records despite multiple anomaly warnings.

primary_review.summary: Report is structurally coherent and includes a disclaimer, but all top candidates rely on a single broker source with high positive divergence flagged as requiring manual control. No manual reviews have been performed, and the report explicitly notes that manual approval should remain active until additional checks are integrated. This makes the output useful for internal review but not yet ready for public automation.
reasons: Disclaimer present and clearly states no investment advice.
All top candidates have broker_count=1 and risk_label=MANUAL_CONTROL, indicating insufficient consensus.
Anomalies flag high positive divergence for each top candidate, requiring manual review.
Manual review count is 0, meaning no human verification has been applied.
Report's own next_actions recommend keeping manual approval on until further checks are wired in.
risks: Single-broker targets may be biased or stale, leading to misleading rankings.
No manual review performed despite explicit risk labels and anomaly warnings.
Report acknowledges it is not ready for public automation, so publishing as-is could mislead users.
Lack of current price comparison or consensus engine output reduces interpretability.

secondary_review.summary: Report is internally coherent and includes a disclaimer, but relies on a single broker source for all top candidates, lacks consensus engine output, and has no manual review records despite multiple anomaly warnings.
reasons: All top candidates are based on a single broker report, reducing consensus reliability.
Anomalies flagged for all top candidates require manual control but no manual reviews are recorded.
Consensus engine output is not yet implemented, limiting comparability of target prices.
Report date is 2026-07-01, which is in the future relative to current date, raising freshness concerns.
Disclaimer is present, but the report is marked as draft and not ready for public automation.
risks: Single-broker data may not represent market consensus, leading to biased signals.
Lack of manual review on flagged anomalies could allow erroneous data to persist.
Future report date may indicate data staleness or testing data, not live market conditions.
Missing consensus engine and broker count filters reduce analytical depth and user clarity.
